description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:12-alpine Docker image and defining two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a generate_stats job that runs `apk --update --no-cache add git jq bash gzip curl tree coreutils grep`, then `bash ./analysis.sh`, then `mv dist public`, and always uploads the `public`, `results`, and `tmp` directories as artifacts. Also in the build stage add a shellcheck job that uses the koalaman/shellcheck-alpine image and runs `shellcheck ./analysis.sh`. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs `ls public`, publishes the `public` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
